commands.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ServerAliveInterval=10 -o ServerAliveCountMax=2 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new 'user@100.96.89.98' 'set -e; mkdir -p '\''/home/user/turbalance-analytics'\'' '\''/home/user/turbalance-analytics/build'\'' '\''/home/user/.config/turbalance'\'' '\''/home/user/.config/systemd/user'\'' '\''/home/user/.local/state/turbalance/live-machine-agent'\'' '\''/home/user/.local/state/turbalance/live-machine-agent/spool'\'' '\''/home/user/.local/state/turbalance/otelcol/file_storage'\'' '\''/home/user/.local/share/turbalance/node-exporter-textfile'\''; chmod 700 '\''/home/user/.local/state/turbalance/live-machine-agent'\'' '\''/home/user/.local/state/turbalance/live-machine-agent/spool'\'''

ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ServerAliveInterval=10 -o ServerAliveCountMax=2 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new 'user@100.96.89.98' 'mkdir -p '\''/home/user/.config/turbalance'\'' && printf %s '\'''\'' | base64 -d > '\''/home/user/.config/turbalance/live-machine-agent.env'\'' && chmod '\''600'\'' '\''/home/user/.config/turbalance/live-machine-agent.env'\'''

ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ServerAliveInterval=10 -o ServerAliveCountMax=2 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new 'user@100.96.89.98' 'mkdir -p '\''/home/user/.config/systemd/user'\'' && printf %s '\'''\'' | base64 -d > '\''/home/user/.config/systemd/user/turbalance-machine-benchmark.service'\'' && chmod '\''644'\'' '\''/home/user/.config/systemd/user/turbalance-machine-benchmark.service'\'''

ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ServerAliveInterval=10 -o ServerAliveCountMax=2 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new 'user@100.96.89.98' 'systemctl --user daemon-reload'

ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o ServerAliveInterval=10 -o ServerAliveCountMax=2 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new 'user@100.96.89.98' 'systemctl --user enable --now turbalance-live-machine-agent.service'
